data.title: Cardiff Oncology Formalizes Executive Departures Amid Strategic Review
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cardiff Oncology ( (CRDF) ) has provided an update.

Cardiff Oncology disclosed that on January 26, 2026 its CEO, Dr. Mark Erlander, and CFO, James Levine, stepped down as part of a strategic review, and on March 27, 2026 the company formalized their departures with separation agreements. Erlander will receive one year of his $635,000 base salary, his 2025 bonus, a pro-rated portion of his 2026 target bonus, continued healthcare for up to 12 months, extended stock option vesting until June 2026, and will remain as a consultant.

Levine will receive one year of his $490,000 base salary, his 2025 bonus, a pro-rated portion of his 2026 target bonus, continued healthcare for up to 12 months, and a 12-month post-separation exercise window for vested stock options. Both executives agreed to general release and confidentiality terms, highlighting a structured leadership transition that may influence Cardiff Oncology’s strategic direction and corporate governance stability during its review process.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRDF) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cardiff Oncology stock, see the CRDF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRDF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRDF is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, large ongoing losses, and sustained cash burn with shrinking equity), reinforced by bearish technical momentum (below key moving averages and negative MACD). Offsetting factors include a low-debt balance sheet and positive program-related corporate updates that could improve prospects if regulatory/clinical milestones are achieved.

To see Spark’s full report on CRDF stock, click here.

More about Cardiff Oncology

Cardiff Oncology, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing oncology therapies. The company operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, concentrating on treatments for cancer patients and targeting growth opportunities in the oncology drug development market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,091,533

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: VistaGen Faces Nasdaq Audit Committee Compliance Setback
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

VistaGen Therapeutics ( (VTGN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 1, 2026, VistaGen Therapeutics, Inc. notified Nasdaq that it had fallen out of compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5605(c)(2) after director Mary Rotunno’s resignation that day reduced its Audit Committee from three independent members to two. The company’s Nasdaq Capital Market listing remains unaffected for now, and under Nasdaq’s cure provisions VistaGen has until the earlier of its next annual shareholder meeting or up to one year from April 1, 2026, to add a qualified director and restore Audit Committee compliance, a step that will be closely watched by investors and governance stakeholders.

VistaGen also informed Nasdaq that its board plans to regain full compliance with the audit committee membership rule within the allowed cure period, signaling an intent to stabilize its governance structure. The temporary non-compliance underscores the sensitivity of Nasdaq-listed companies to board changes and places near-term focus on VistaGen’s director recruitment and corporate governance actions.

The most recent analyst rating on (VTGN) stock is a Sell with a $0.54 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VistaGen Therapeutics stock, see the VTGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VTGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VTGN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by sustained large losses and heavy cash burn on minimal revenue, combined with a weak long-term price trend and negative MACD. Neutral-to-mixed clinical/program updates and low leverage provide some support, but are outweighed by delisting risk and the PALISADE-3 setback.

To see Spark’s full report on VTGN stock, click here.

More about VistaGen Therapeutics

VistaGen Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies in the life sciences sector. The company’s shares are listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market, subject to Nasdaq’s corporate governance and listing standards for board and committee composition.

Average Trading Volume: 909,218

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $23.8M

The latest announcement is out from Tyson Foods ( (TSN) ).

On April 2, 2026, Tyson Foods announced that Phillip Thomas will be appointed Vice President, Controller and Chief Accounting Officer, effective April 6, 2026, succeeding Lori Bondar, who will step down from the Chief Accounting Officer role but remain as Senior Vice President to assist with the transition before retiring later in the fiscal year. Thomas, a long-time Tyson executive who previously held the same chief accounting role and other senior finance positions since 2008, will receive a base salary of $360,574 plus annual and long-term incentive opportunities, underscoring continuity in the company’s finance leadership and signaling a stable succession plan for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSN) stock is a Buy with a $72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tyson Foods stock, see the TSN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Kingstone Unveils Record Results and California Expansion Plans
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kingstone Companies ( (KINS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kingstone Companies, Inc., a Northeast-focused property and casualty insurance holding company specializing in tailored homeowners coverage through its Select product suite, operates primarily in New York via Kingstone Insurance Company and ranks among the state’s larger homeowners insurers. The carrier distributes through retail and wholesale agents, leverages a low expense ratio and scalable platform, and holds licenses in multiple surrounding states to support targeted regional growth.

In an April 1, 2026 shareholder letter, CEO Meryl Golden highlighted record 2025 results, including net income of $40.8 million, diluted EPS of $2.88, a 75% combined ratio and a 43% return on equity, following a multiyear restructuring that refocused the business and cut costs. As part of a five-year plan to double written premiums to $500 million by 2029, Kingstone detailed a measured entry into California’s excess and surplus homeowners market starting in the second quarter of 2026, aiming to capitalize on admitted carriers’ pullback, diversify away from New York, and apply its New York playbook of sophisticated pricing, tight risk controls, and disciplined underwriting while keeping California to a small share of premiums and heavily reinsured in the near term.

The most recent analyst rating on (KINS) stock is a Buy with a $17.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kingstone Companies stock, see the KINS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KINS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KINS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving (but still uneven) financial performance and very attractive valuation (low P/E). These positives are tempered by only neutral-to-weak technical momentum and earnings-call guidance that bakes in higher catastrophe losses, limiting near-term headline earnings upside.

To see Spark’s full report on KINS stock, click here.

More about Kingstone Companies

Kingstone Companies, Inc. is a Northeast regional property and casualty insurance holding company whose principal operating subsidiary, Kingstone Insurance Company, is a New York–domiciled carrier. The group distributes tailored homeowners insurance solutions through retail and wholesale agents using its Select product suite and scalable operating platform, and it was the 11th-largest homeowners writer in New York in 2025, with additional licenses across several Northeastern states.

The company focuses on catastrophe‑exposed property risks, emphasizing pricing sophistication, expense efficiency and disciplined underwriting to pursue significant market opportunities and strategic geographic expansion beyond its core New York footprint.

Average Trading Volume: 127,964

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $210.5M

data.title: BioNTech Calls Virtual 2026 AGM, Seeks Larger Supervisory Board to Back Oncology Push
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

BioNTech SE ( (BNTX) ) has issued an announcement.

BioNTech SE disclosed in an April 2, 2026 Form 6-K that it has convened its 2026 Annual General Meeting for May 15, 2026, to be held virtually without physical shareholder attendance, with participation and voting to occur via an online Investor Portal and electronic absentee voting. The AGM will present the 2025 financial statements and compensation report, propose carrying forward the full 2025 balance sheet profit of roughly €6.9 billion, and seek shareholder approvals on management and supervisory board actions and the reappointment of EY as auditor.

In a move that underscores its growth and oncology-focused transformation, BioNTech is asking shareholders to amend its Articles of Association to expand the Supervisory Board from six to eight members, citing the need for broader expertise in oncology, marketing and clinical development. The company plans to fill the two new seats with industry experts, aiming to strengthen oversight and support for its strategic realignment, while the virtual, publicly broadcast AGM format is designed to accommodate global shareholders and ADS holders and maintain broad transparency.

The most recent analyst rating on (BNTX) stock is a Hold with a $89.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BioNTech SE stock, see the BNTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BNTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BNTX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by deteriorated profitability and bearish technicals (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors include strong solvency and liquidity with very low leverage, plus a generally constructive earnings update around pipeline progress and strategic de-risking, though near-term guidance points to lower revenues and higher spend.

To see Spark’s full report on BNTX stock, click here.

More about BioNTech SE

BioNTech SE is a Germany-based biotechnology company headquartered in Mainz and known globally for its mRNA-based medicines, including vaccines and immunotherapies. Listed in both Germany and the United States, the company is increasingly focused on oncology, aligning its governance and board expertise with a strategic realignment toward cancer therapeutics and related clinical development and commercialization.

Average Trading Volume: 1,168,307

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $22.47B

Find detailed analytics on BNTX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cartier Silver Grants 1.89 Million Stock Options to Align Stakeholders With Long-Term Growth
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Cartier Iron ( (TSE:CFE) ).

Cartier Silver Corporation has granted stock options to its directors, officers and consultants to purchase a total of 1,890,000 common shares at an exercise price of $0.20 per share, exercisable until April 2, 2031. Any shares issued upon exercise of these options will be subject to a four-month resale restriction, underscoring the company’s use of equity-based incentives to align management and consultants with long-term shareholder interests while advancing its silver, iron ore and gold exploration portfolio.

The option grant reflects Cartier Silver’s ongoing reliance on stock-based compensation to retain key personnel in a capital-intensive exploration sector where cash preservation is critical. By tying potential upside to future share performance and imposing a hold period, the company aims to incentivize long-term value creation across its Bolivian silver projects, Quebec iron ore holdings and Newfoundland and Labrador gold assets, which may influence investor perception of dilution versus growth potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CFE) stock is a Hold with a C$0.42 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cartier Iron stock, see the TSE:CFE Stock Forecast page.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing operating losses, and negative free cash flow), with only partial offset from low leverage. Technicals are supportive due to strong uptrend momentum, but overbought indicators increase near-term risk. Valuation further pressures the score given the high P/E and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on CFE stock, click here.

More about Cartier Iron

Cartier Silver Corporation is a mineral exploration and development company focused primarily on silver assets in southern Bolivia, including the Chorrillos Project and related claims in the Potosi Department. The company also holds significant iron ore resources at its Gagnon Holdings in the southern Labrador Trough in Quebec, as well as the Big Easy gold property in the Burin Peninsula epithermal gold belt of eastern Newfoundland and Labrador.

data.title: Riverview Bancorp Expands Board, Adds Technology and Real Estate Expertise
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Riverview Bancorp ( (RVSB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Riverview Bancorp, Inc., headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, is the parent of 103-year-old Riverview Bank and Riverview Trust Company, operating 17 branches and three lending centers with $1.51 billion in assets as of December 31, 2025. The community bank focuses on commercial, business, and retail clients in the Portland-Vancouver area and has been voted Best Bank by readers of The Columbian for 12 consecutive years.

Riverview Bancorp, Inc. announced on March 30, 2026, that it appointed technology entrepreneur Kourosh Zamani and homebuilder-developer Jon Girod to the boards of both the company and Riverview Bank, following a recommendation by the Nominating and Governance Committee. To accommodate the new directors, the board amended the company’s bylaws to expand its size from eight to ten members, reflecting an effort to broaden strategic expertise.

Zamani, co-founder of AI-driven time capture firm Laurel and a former investment management executive, brings technology and growth experience, while Girod, a longtime Vancouver builder and nonprofit founder, adds deep real estate and community development insight. The appointments, effective immediately and free of related-party or family ties, are intended to strengthen Riverview’s regional roots and innovation focus for clients and communities in the Pacific Northwest.

The most recent analyst rating on (RVSB) stock is a Hold with a $5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Riverview Bancorp stock, see the RVSB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RVSB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RVSB is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mid-range financial performance: strong recent revenue step-up, improving leverage, and solid cash conversion, offset by modest current margins/ROE and declining FCF growth versus prior periods. Technicals are supportive with price above key moving averages, while valuation and dividend yield are only average for the profitability profile. Corporate events add a modest tailwind via expected NIM/EPS uplift and buybacks, despite the near-term realized loss from the portfolio repositioning.

To see Spark’s full report on RVSB stock, click here.

More about Riverview Bancorp

Riverview Bancorp, Inc., headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, is the parent of 103-year-old Riverview Bank and Riverview Trust Company, operating 17 branches and three lending centers with $1.51 billion in assets as of December 31, 2025. The community bank focuses on commercial, business, and retail clients in the Portland-Vancouver area and has been voted Best Bank by readers of The Columbian for 12 consecutive years.

The company emphasizes high-quality community banking services and regional engagement along the I-5 corridor just north of Portland, Ore. Its long-standing local presence underpins its strategy of serving businesses and households in the Pacific Northwest through traditional banking and trust services.

Riverview Bancorp, Inc. announced on March 30, 2026, that it appointed technology entrepreneur Kourosh Zamani and homebuilder-developer Jon Girod to the boards of both the company and Riverview Bank, following a recommendation by the Nominating and Governance Committee. To accommodate the new directors, the board amended the company’s bylaws to expand its size from eight to ten members, reflecting an effort to broaden strategic expertise.

Zamani, co-founder of AI-driven time capture firm Laurel and a former investment management executive, brings technology and growth experience, while Girod, a longtime Vancouver builder and nonprofit founder, adds deep real estate and community development insight. The appointments, effective immediately and free of related-party or family ties, are intended to strengthen Riverview’s regional roots and innovation focus for clients and communities in the Pacific Northwest.

Diamond Hill Investment Group ( (DHIL) ) has shared an announcement.

As of March 31, 2026, Diamond Hill Capital Management reported total assets under management of $25.9 billion across its product lineup. The bulk of assets were held in proprietary funds at $16.7 billion, followed by $4.2 billion in separately managed accounts, $3.6 billion in other pooled vehicles and $1.4 billion in collective investment trusts, underscoring the firm’s reliance on its proprietary fund platform.

By strategy, the firm’s largest exposures were in Large Cap equity at $10.7 billion and Short Duration Securitized Bond at $5.3 billion, with Core Fixed Income adding $3.8 billion to its fixed income presence. The remaining assets were distributed among various equity strategies, including Long-Short, Small-Mid Cap, Mid Cap and Select, indicating a diversified product mix with a pronounced tilt toward large-cap equities and securitized fixed income solutions for its clients.

data.title: Stabilis Solutions Terminates Key Galveston LNG Supply Agreement
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Stabilis Solutions ( (SLNG) ) has shared an update.

On March 31, 2026, Stabilis GDS terminated a previously announced 10-year LNG supply agreement with a leading investment-grade global marine operator tied to its proposed Galveston liquefaction facility. The contract would have covered about 50 million gallons of LNG annually, roughly 40% of the plant’s planned capacity, with minimum volume commitments equal to about 32% of that capacity.

The company ended the deal after prospective project financing partners sought changes to contract terms that the customer refused to accept. As a result, Stabilis now expects delays to its final investment decision, financing, and development schedule for the Galveston facility, though it continues to pursue the project and is in talks with other potential customers on alternative offtake arrangements.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLNG) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Stabilis Solutions stock, see the SLNG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLNG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLNG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by a solid balance sheet and improved recent cash flow, but it is held back by inconsistent earnings (including 2025 losses) and weak technical trend signals. Earnings-call outlook is mixed: near-term headwinds in 2026 are significant, partially offset by a large awarded contract and project progress that could drive growth if executed.

To see Spark’s full report on SLNG stock, click here.

More about Stabilis Solutions

Stabilis Solutions, through its wholly owned subsidiary Stabilis GDS, operates in the liquefied natural gas sector, focusing on the production and supply of LNG. The company targets industrial and marine customers, with a strategic emphasis on developing liquefaction infrastructure such as its planned 350,000 gallon-per-day Galveston LNG facility to serve global marine and other energy markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond Finalizes Brand House Collective Acquisition
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Bed Bath & Beyond ( (BBBY) ) is now available.

On April 2, 2026, Bed Bath & Beyond completed its previously announced acquisition of The Brand House Collective, merging its Knight Merger Sub subsidiary into TBHC and making TBHC a wholly owned unit. Each TBHC common share outstanding before the effective time was converted into the right to receive 0.1993 Bed Bath & Beyond common shares, with any resulting fractional BBBY shares settled in cash based on the April 1, 2026 closing price, and TBHC equity awards were either converted into BBBY stock or cancelled depending on their exercise price or vesting terms.

In connection with closing the TBHC deal on April 2, 2026, Bed Bath & Beyond also entered into a Contribution Agreement with TBHC, under which it injected $30 million of capital into the acquired company. The contribution, effective immediately after the merger’s closing, is earmarked for general corporate purposes, including repaying a portion of TBHC’s outstanding debt to Bank of America, N.A., strengthening the subsidiary’s balance sheet and supporting post-merger integration.

The most recent analyst rating on (BBBY) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bed Bath & Beyond stock, see the BBBY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BBBY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BBBY is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (shrinking revenue, ongoing losses, and negative operating/free cash flow) and bearish technical signals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). The latest earnings call and corporate actions provide a moderate offset due to margin/EBITDA improvement and growth plans, but execution and integration risks remain significant.

To see Spark’s full report on BBBY stock, click here.

More about Bed Bath & Beyond

Bed Bath & Beyond is a U.S. home goods retailer focused on selling household merchandise such as bedding, bath items, kitchenware, and home décor to consumers. The company operates primarily through large-format specialty stores and online platforms, targeting value-conscious shoppers in the home furnishings and domestic merchandise market.
